There is a 24-hour water supply, supported by both borewell and corporation sources. The building is equipped with 100 power backup, guaranteeing uninterrupted electricity. Security is a priority with a dedicated security guard, CCTV installations, and three lifts for easy access.Locality Located in a well-connected neighborhood, this flat is close to essential amenities. The Kongav landmark is nearby, and the area is well-served by schools, hospitals, malls, and supermarkets, all within a 1 km radius.
